summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apixel Portfolio website. All required features implemented and working correctly. Fixed one minor phone number inconsistency in Contact page.
passed_tests: Backend health check at /api/health returns healthy status
All backend API endpoints (services, blogs, templates, contact, auth) working correctly
WhatsApp floating button links to correct number +8801754407239
Store page hero text: 'Stop Waiting. Your Customers Are Already Looking For You Online.'
Store page collection title: 'One Decision Away From a Professional Online Presence'
Template card button text shows 'View Details' (verified in code)
Dark/Light mode toggle button exists with data-testid='theme-toggle-btn'
Theme toggle switches between dark and light modes correctly
Theme preference persists in localStorage key 'apixel_theme'
Light mode applies lighter backgrounds and darker text correctly
Template Details page loads properly with 'Back to Store' link
All navigation links working (Home, Services, Store, About, Contact)
Get Started button correctly navigates to contact page
Mobile responsiveness working with mobile menu toggle
